name: Twilight Zone — Narrative fMRI
description: fMRI from participants watching an episode of 'The Twilight Zone', shared on OpenNeuro (ds001145). A naturalistic narrative dataset used to study how the brain integrates information over long timescales and constructs situation models.
citation: Chen J, et al. (2016). Accessing real-life episodic information from minutes versus moments of experience. Cerebral Cortex.
